recommendations.title: The Last Dragon
recommendations.overview: A young man searches for the "master" to obtain the final level of martial arts mastery known as the glow. Along the way he must fight an evil martial arts expert and rescue a beautiful singer from an obsessed music promoter.

recommendations.title: Game of Death
recommendations.overview: A martial arts movie star must fake his death to find the people who are trying to kill him.

recommendations.title: Crippled Avengers
recommendations.overview: A group of martial artists seek revenge after being crippled by Tu Tin-To, a martial arts master, and his son.

recommendations.title: The Master
recommendations.overview: When old martial arts master Master Tak disappears, his best student, Jet, steps in to find him. However, when he learns that Tak's life is in danger, he decides to protect him at all costs.

recommendations.title: Old Dads
recommendations.overview: A cranky middle-aged dad and his two best friends find themselves out of step in a changing world of millennial CEOs and powerful preschool principals.

recommendations.title: Officer Black Belt
recommendations.overview: A talented martial artist who can't walk past a person in need unites with a probation officer to fight and prevent crime as a martial arts officer.

recommendations.title: Bruce Lee, the Legend
recommendations.overview: The Official Golden Harvest tribute to the Master of the Martial Arts Film, Bruce Lee.

recommendations.title: Fearless
recommendations.overview: After going through a series of tragic events in his life, martial arts master Huo Yuanjia returns to Tianjin and must fight four international soldiers, in order to safeguard his nation's pride.

recommendations.title: Street Fighter
recommendations.overview: Colonel Guile and various other martial arts heroes fight against the tyranny of dictator M. Bison and his cohorts.

recommendations.title: Remo Williams: The Adventure Begins
